name: Single-Leg Romanian Deadlift
setup: Hold dumbbell in opposite hand to standing leg
Stand on one leg, slight knee bend
execution: Hinge at hip, sending free leg straight back
Dumbbell lowers toward floor, back stays flat
Go until torso parallel to floor (or hamstring stretch)
Reverse by driving hip forward, squeezing glute
common_mistakes: Not going back far enough (need balance practice)
cues: Push the floor away behind you with the free leg
Hips stay square (like headlights on a car)
Reach for something with the dumbbell hand
